---
description: 'Resume work from a handoff document by parsing its scope, context, progress, and next steps so you can seamlessly continue execution with full situational awareness whenever you pick up a task started by someone else or from an earlier session.'
agent: 'agent'
---

---
description: Resume work from a handoff document
argument-hint: <handoff-file>
---

Read and load the handoff document from `$ARGUMENTS` and resume the work.

Parse and understand:
- Task scope and objectives
- All file references and their context
- Key discoveries made
- Work completed so far
- Current status
- Next steps to execute

After loading, confirm understanding and ask if I should proceed with the next steps or if there are any changes to the plan.
